title: He woke inside a silver cocoon
description: A vertical English story episode with a crisis hook and cliffhanger.

scenes.narration: The boy opened his eyes inside a silver cocoon, while the building above him burned.

visual.prompt: cinematic vertical frame, young survivor inside a silver cocoon under collapsed ruins, dramatic firelight

scenes.narration: Every voice outside called him dead, but something in the cocoon was answering his thoughts.

visual.prompt: same character, glowing cocoon, rescue lights, hidden power awakening

scenes.narration: Then he saw the rescue photo, and the body beside the cocoon was wearing his face.

visual.prompt: cinematic close-up of a rescue photo showing an impossible duplicate face, suspenseful lighting

story.question: Why is the corpse wearing his face?

quality.transformativeNote: Example only: proper nouns removed, details rewritten, narration original, generic survival/duplicate motif retained.
